subject: Shiftry, a taller bipedal creature with large fan-like leaf appendages for hands, in a rocky forested setting
description: A tall, lean bipedal creature stands against a backdrop of rocky terrain and leafy vegetation. The figure has large, fan-shaped leaf appendages in place of hands or arms, extended outward in a wide stance that reads as threatening or commanding. The creature has a shaggy, wild appearance with loose hair-like elements at the top of its head and a lean dark body. The rocky and wooded background grounds it in a rugged natural environment. The overall mood is more assertive and menacing than the earlier evolutionary stage.
foreground: Tall lean bipedal creature with large leaf-fan appendages spread wide
